channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large broken tree branch snapped off hanging in road, 10th April
item.description:
A neighbor was able to pull it off the road onto the grass verge so that it doesn't cause any accidents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge repairing, 10th April
item.description:
Grass verge scalped during recent cutting by council contractors. Requires repairing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenwood Drive, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On lampost, 10th April
item.description:
It’s on the lampost by the stop
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tag, 10th April
item.description:
Over stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, Shooters Hill, Shooters Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Large lip/raised concrete across the path, 10th April
item.description:
There is an extreme lip or raised area along the pavement, so much so that my buggy nearly flipped forward when we went into it as I didn't know it was there. It's very dangerous and really needs to be fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left behind by Hackney Council refuse collection, 10th April
item.description:
The refuse and recycling collections often leave rubbish in their wake but this is the worst I've seen to date. There's other rubbish that's been left behind in the street but this collection by the bike bin outside nos. 9/10 Horton Road is disgraceful.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Horton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerb stone has come away, 10th April
item.description:
Stop bp3727. kerb stone has come away from bus stop, unable to move up close to stop to serve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tag on wall, 10th April
item.description:
Graffiti tag on external grey wall of flats at the top of lower station road next to the roadsign. Can it be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes of what appears to be balloon canisters/smart whips (nitrous oxide) are being fly tipped outside the houses of 31 Gladewood Road - 34 Thornton Road., 10th April
item.description:
Boxes of nitrous oxide balloon canisters are being dumped outside by the parking spaces belonging to 31 Gladeswood Road - 34 Thornton Road. There appears to be more than a few weeks ago when first dumped. I don’t believe it to be anyone living in the addresses named as they are majority all families with young children. Given that there are families with young children / children that play outside the canisters should not be there for them to interact with.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornton Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence between the park and carpark by Park Langley Parade of Shops, 10th April
item.description:
This was reported months ago. Two temporary metal fences have been put up by the council. Teenagers have now pulled down another section and are climbing over into the park late at night with alcohol and throwing the cans and glass bottle into the carpark. This is also a security issue for the residents using the carpark. When are you going to replace?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and kids toys and clothing dumped alongside river bank, 10th April
item.description:
There are kids mattress, toys and clothing all been dumped along side the crayford river down by the new build flats as been here since October 2025 maybe even before that.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Supports have been knocked, 10th April
item.description:
The council mowed the lawn this week and the mower has hit the support.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsdown Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes and household items left on the entrance of the close, 10th April
item.description:
This flytipping has been there for the past two days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nickelby Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 major pot holes, 10th April
item.description:
Pot holes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Albany Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TV and black bin bags, 10th April
item.description:
TV and black bin bags dumped underneath the no flytipping sign. This is a continual problem and the perpetyrators dont care. you need to start fining them
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree next to busy pathway, 10th April
item.description:
Dead tree next to busy pathway at risk of falling and hurting pedestrian. Tree next to it already fallen and needs clearing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Place Park, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste, 10th April
item.description:
Corner of borough high street and talbot yard. Still not resolved. There is a rodent problem now and human faeces there. Can this be cleaned up as a matter of urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Borough High Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving slabs missing from Erith Pier, 10th April
item.description:
There are several areas along the pier where there are missing paving slabs, potentially creating a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wharfside Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th April
item.description:
Abandoned old mattress and TV set outside Breaside prep school on Orchard Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-43, Orchard Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to Finchley Rd on north side of Frognal, 10th April
item.description:
This gully is repeatedly blocked. I spoke to Dominos to see if they were responsible to putting oil down the drain. They said their drains went into Finchley Road drains.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Frognal, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
